summary: Render Stability Testing for Story Video Pipeline completed on preview environment (render-stability.preview.emergentagent.com). All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - login, dashboard, Story Video Studio creation form and completed job viewing all working. Videos stored in R2 and accessible. The optimized render stage (640x360, 10fps, CRF 35, single-threaded) is producing videos successfully with ~35s render time for 3 scenes.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI elements - minor visual issue, doesn't block functionality

critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_engine.py run_stage_render: Sequential scene rendering with single-threaded ffmpeg (-threads 1) working correctly
pipeline_engine.py run_stage_render: 640x360 resolution with 10fps and CRF 35 producing valid H.264 MP4 videos
pipeline_engine.py run_stage_render: Aggressive temp file cleanup with gc.collect() after each scene
pipeline_engine.py _run_ffmpeg: Async subprocess with -nostdin and -loglevel error flags added automatically
pipeline_worker.py: 1 worker configuration for production stability, stale job cleanup on restart with credit refund
StoryVideoPipeline.js: 4 phases (input/processing/done/error) with proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Dashboard, Story Video Studio input/done phases all functional)

test_credentials.test_user_note: test@visionary-suite.com may not exist in preview DB

seed_data_creation: Used existing test jobs from iteration 152 (TEST_Concurrent_1, TEST_Concurrent_2, TEST_Iter152_Run5_Clay)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Video Pipeline is stable on preview environment. Render stage optimized with sequential processing, single-threaded ffmpeg, 640x360@10fps. Videos upload to R2 successfully. Demo user has unlimited credits. Pipeline worker count is 1 (for production stability). Completed jobs show performance breakdown with typical times: Scenes ~8s, Images ~58s, Voices ~16s, Render ~35s, Upload ~2s, Total ~120s.

POST /api/pipeline/create.validation: Rejects story < 50 chars, empty titles, copyrighted content (Disney, Marvel)

GET /api/pipeline/status/{job_id}.returns: progress, stages (all 5 with status/timing), scene_progress, output_url, timing breakdown

GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs.returns: List of user's pipeline jobs sorted by created_at

Frontend Login.features: Email/password login, Google SSO option, clean dark UI

Frontend Dashboard.features: Welcome message, credits display (999,999,999 for demo), feature cards including Story to Video Studio (BETA)

Frontend Story Video Studio - Input Phas.features: Title input, story textarea with char count, 6 animation styles, 5 age groups, 5 voice presets, Generate button (disabled until valid input), Recent Videos sidebar

Frontend Story Video Studio - Done Phase.features: Video player with R2 URL, Download Video button, Create Another button, Performance timing breakdown, credits used display
